title: Kannil Anbai Solvale Lyrics From Eesan Movie
stanzas:
Kannil anbai solvaalae
yaarum illai ivalpolae.
thunban ennai theendaamal
thaayaai kaappaal manmaele.(2)

sila neram punnagaiyaale
pookkal thandhiduvaal.
sila neram sandhaigalaale
ennai vendriduvaal.

pesaamal mounathinaale
manathai solliduvaal.
ival sondham podhum
ennum ennam thandhiduvaal.

Kannil anbai solvaalae
yaarum illai ivalpolae.
thunban ennai theendaamal
thaayaai kaappaal manmaele.

Ulagam endhan ulagam
engum ivale vandhiduvaal.
uyaram konjam valarndhapodhum
kuzhandhai endriduvaal.

ullangaiyil paasam vaithu
unavai thandhiduvaal.
urangumpodhum urangaamal
en arugil nindriduvaal.

ival pole ivalai pole
vazhvil nanbargal illai.
maru jenmam vandhaal kooda
naanthan ivalin pillai.

Kannil anbai solvaalae
yaarum illai ivalpolae.
thunban ennai theendaamal
thaayaai kaappaal manmaele.

kanneer thuligal vendum
endru kannai ketkindren
kanneer thudaika ivalum
vandhal thinamum azhukindren.

ennai naane kaanbadhupole
ivalai paarkindren.
endrum engum vazhithunaiyaaga
ivalai kaetkindren.

uravennum varthaikkuthaan
artham indru kanden.
ival anbin velicham munne
iravum pagalthaan enbaen.

Kannil anbai solvaalae
yaarum illai ivalpolae.
thunban ennai theendaamal
thaayaai kaappaal manmaele.

sila neram punnagaiyaale
pookkal thandhiduvaal.
sila neram sandhaigalaale
ennai vendriduvaal.

pesaamal mounathinaale
manathai solliduvaal.
ival sondham podhum
ennum ennam thandhiduvaal.

Kannil anbai solvaalae
yaarum illai ivalpolae.
thunban ennai theendaamal
thaayaai kaappaal manmaele.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannil Anbai Solvalae?

The song explores themes of unspoken love and emotional connection.

Who composed the music for Eesan?

The music for Eesan was composed by James Vasanthan.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kannil Anbai Solvalae?

The lyrics were penned by Na Muthukumar.

What is the release year of the movie Eesan?

The movie Eesan was released in 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kannil Anbai Solvalae is a poignant melody from the movie Eesan, capturing the essence of silent love and emotional depth. The song is beautifully rendered by Padmanabhan, with heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar. It conveys the tender emotions of love and longing, evoking a sense of soothing melancholy. James Vasanthan's composition enhances the song's emotional impact, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kannil Anbai Solvalae from the movie Eesan is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of unspoken love and deep emotions. Sung by Padmanabhan with lyrics by Na Muthukumar, this song beautifully conveys the nuances of affection and longing. James Vasanthan's soulful composition adds an enchanting layer to this unforgettable track.
stanzaMeanings: No one can express love through their eyes like her. She protects me like a mother, keeping sadness away from me.
Sometimes she gives flowers with a smile. Sometimes she wins me over with arguments.
Without speaking, she tells her heart through silence. She gives me the feeling that her companionship is enough.
No one can express love through their eyes like her. She protects me like a mother, keeping sadness away from me.
She comes into my world everywhere. Even as I grow taller, she still calls me a child.
She feeds me with love in her hands. Even when I sleep, she stands by me without sleeping.
There are no friends in life like her. Even if I am reborn, I want to be her child.
No one can express love through their eyes like her. She protects me like a mother, keeping sadness away from me.
I ask my eyes for tears, and when she comes to wipe them, I cry every day.
I see her as I see myself. I want her as my guide always and everywhere.
Today I found the meaning of the word 'relationship.' Her love is the light, and I will call it day and night.
No one can express love through their eyes like her. She protects me like a mother, keeping sadness away from me.
Sometimes she gives flowers with a smile. Sometimes she wins me over with arguments.
Without speaking, she tells her heart through silence. She gives me the feeling that her companionship is enough.
No one can express love through their eyes like her. She protects me like a mother, keeping sadness away from me.
